tasks.label: Backend: Start
args: $envFile = Join-Path $PWD ".env"; if (Test-Path $envFile) { Get-Content $envFile | Where-Object { $_ -match "^[A-Z_][A-Z0-9_]*=" } | ForEach-Object { $k,$v = $_ -split '=',2; Set-Item -Path ("Env:" + $k) -Value $v.Trim() } }; $listener = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if ($listener) { $processName = (Get-Process -Id $listener.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).ProcessName; if ($processName -match "^javaw?$") { Write-Output "Starting BackendOrderlyApplication (already running on port 8080)"; Write-Output "Started BackendOrderlyApplication (reusing existing process)"; exit 0 } else { Write-Error ("Port 8080 is already in use by process '{0}'. Stop it or change the backend port." -f $processName); exit 1 } }; .\mvnw.cmd spring-boot:run

tasks.label: Tablet: Build & Launch
args: $adb = Join-Path $env:LOCALAPPDATA 'Android\Sdk\platform-tools\adb.exe'; $devices = & $adb devices | Where-Object { $_ -and $_.Trim().EndsWith('device') -and -not $_.StartsWith('List of devices') } | ForEach-Object { $serial = $_.ToString().Split([char]9)[0].Trim(); $avd = (& $adb -s $serial emu avd name 2>$null | Select-Object -First 1).Trim(); [pscustomobject]@{ Serial = $serial; Avd = $avd } }; $target = $devices | Where-Object { $_.Avd -match 'Tablet' } | Select-Object -First 1; if (-not $target) { Write-Error 'No online tablet emulator found.'; exit 1 }; Write-Output ("Using Android target: {0} ({1})" -f $target.Avd, $target.Serial); .\gradlew.bat assembleDebug; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { $apk = Join-Path $PWD 'app\build\outputs\apk\debug\app-debug.apk'; if (-not (Test-Path $apk)) { Write-Error ("APK not found: {0}" -f $apk); exit 1 }; & $adb -s $target.Serial install -r $apk; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { & $adb -s $target.Serial shell am start -n 'com.example.orderlytablet/.MainActivity' } }

tasks.label: Phone: Build & Launch
args: $adb = Join-Path $env:LOCALAPPDATA 'Android\Sdk\platform-tools\adb.exe'; $devices = & $adb devices | Where-Object { $_ -and $_.Trim().EndsWith('device') -and -not $_.StartsWith('List of devices') } | ForEach-Object { $serial = $_.ToString().Split([char]9)[0].Trim(); $avd = (& $adb -s $serial emu avd name 2>$null | Select-Object -First 1).Trim(); [pscustomobject]@{ Serial = $serial; Avd = $avd } }; $target = $devices | Where-Object { $_.Avd -match 'Phone' } | Select-Object -First 1; if (-not $target) { Write-Error 'No online phone emulator found.'; exit 1 }; Write-Output ("Using Android target: {0} ({1})" -f $target.Avd, $target.Serial); .\gradlew.bat assembleDebug; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { $apk = Join-Path $PWD 'app\build\outputs\apk\debug\app-debug.apk'; if (-not (Test-Path $apk)) { Write-Error ("APK not found: {0}" -f $apk); exit 1 }; & $adb -s $target.Serial install -r $apk; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { & $adb -s $target.Serial shell am start -n 'com.example.orderlyphone/.app.MainActivity' } }
